ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genetic sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The actual genetic sequence */,
  "structure_prediction" TEXT /* Predicted secondary structure of the sequence */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Estimated binding affinity for the sequence */,
  "motif_score" REAL /* Score representing the presence of motifs in the sequence */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Score representing the sequence alignment with known sequences */,
  "gene_prediction" TEXT /* Predicted gene based on the sequence */,
  "species_id" TEXT /* Reference to the species from which the sequence is derived */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Source of the sequence (e.g., lab, public database) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification of the sequence */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sequence (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the genetic sequence */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., function, location) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the annotation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the annotation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the genetic sequence accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser, device type) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "taxonomic_id" TEXT /* Taxonomic identifier (e.g., NCBI taxon ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., member, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shared_sequences" (
  "shared_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared sequence */,
  "sequence_id" TEXT /* Reference to the genetic sequence */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research group */,
  "shared_by" TEXT /* User who shared the sequence */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shared sequence (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shared_sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_sequences_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shared_sequences_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id")
)
